scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.build:api-deploy: npm run build -w @marketing-funnel/clickup-client && npm run build -w @marketing-funnel/config && npm run build -w @marketing-funnel/db && npm run build -w @marketing-funnel/elevenlabs && npm run build -w @marketing-funnel/email && npm run build -w @marketing-funnel/whatsapp-client && npm run build -w @marketing-funnel/api
